name: Cranberry, Cornbread and Sausage Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cranberries may be fresh or frozen.
2. Remove casings from Italian sausages.
3. Cook Italian sausage with salted butter and oil in two frying pans. Crumble as finely as possible using a potato masher. Drain through a sieve and capture the drippings. Transfer the drained crumbled sausage to a large mixing bowl.
4. Sauté onions with the reserved drippings until translucent. Drain through a sieve and capture the drippings. Transfer the drained onions to the mixing bowl with the sausage.
5. Sauté celery and carrots with the reserved drippings until translucent. Transfer the sautéed celery and carrots, along with the drippings, to the mixing bowl with the sausage and onions.
6. Add cranberries, maple syrup, rosemary (fresh or dried), and marmalade. Mix thoroughly.
7. Add crumbled cornbread and mix well. You may need two large bowls for this step.
8. This stuffing can be baked inside a turkey or in a separate pan.
